it: Lo scopo del presente lavoro di tesi è stato quello di eseguire gli esperimenti fondamentali della Meccanica Quantistica
en: The aim of the present thesis work was to carry out the fundamental experiments of Quantum Mechanics, and to prepare teaching material that, starting from the analysis of these experiments, introduces the conceptual foundations of the theory.

it: Il primo esperimento è quello di Stern e Gerlach; l'apparato sperimentale che realizza quest'esperienza
en: The first experiment is that of Stern and Gerlach; the experimental apparatus that realises this experience was designed internally at the LAFIDIN teaching laboratory, and we have begun to build it; unfortunately at the time of the thesis presentation it is not yet ready, but it will be completed within a few months.

it: Tutti gli altri esperimenti sono stati realizzati con apparecchiature della LEYBOLD
en: All the other experiments were carried out with LEYBOLD equipment, and were performed partly at the LAFIDIN laboratory and partly in Milan, in the “demonstration hall” of LEYBOLD DIDACTIC.

it: La parte teorica della tesi costituisce un'introduzione alla Meccanica Quantistica
en: The theoretical part of the thesis constitutes an introduction to Quantum Mechanics; the theory has been treated from the outset with Dirac notation. The Schrödinger equation was not postulated, but was derived starting from a set of more elementary principles and from the condition that the fundamental law of quantum theory must be consistent with Newton's equation, within the latter's range of applicability.

it: Tutta la trattazione è indipendente dalla Meccanica Analitica
en: The whole treatment is independent of Analytical Mechanics, so the aim of providing an introduction to Quantum Mechanics that relies only on Newton's theory and on electromagnetism, and is therefore easily accessible to third-year Engineering students, has been achieved.

it: Il lavoro è stato diviso in nove “schede”, ogni scheda contiene una parte sperimentale accompagnata da una parte teorica.
en: The work has been divided into nine “cards”; each card contains an experimental part accompanied by a theoretical part.

it: Prima scheda, esperimento di Stern e Gerlach.
Costituisce il punto di partenza; si introduce un sistema molto semplice
en: It constitutes the starting point; a very simple system is introduced, a “spin-½ particle”, which will serve as a prototype for the study and verification of the fundamental laws, which will then be generalised to more complex systems.

it: Seconda scheda, esperimenti di Stern e Gerlach in cascata.
Si complica l'esperimento fondamentale disponendo più apparecchi di Stern e Gerlach in serie
en: The fundamental experiment is made more complex by arranging several Stern–Gerlach apparatuses in series; in this way the behaviour of the spin-½ particle is observed under different conditions, which allows one to “intuit” the fundamental principles of Quantum Mechanics, which are then formulated in a first simplified version.

it: Terza scheda, esperimenti con gli elettroni.
Si prende familiarità con la particella elettrone; lo scopo della scheda
en: One becomes familiar with the electron particle; the aim of the card is not to introduce the fundamental properties of the electron, which are well known, but to show how these properties were determined; moreover this card describes an important experiment that splits the atom into negative electrons and a positive ion, taking a first step towards understanding atomic structure.

it: In questo esperimento gli elettroni si comportano in un modo che non può essere spiegato mediante la teoria classica
en: In this experiment the electrons behave in a way that cannot be explained by classical theory. To give an interpretation of the experimental results, the principles postulated in the second card were recalled; on the basis of these principles, and of the fact that the fundamental equation of Quantum Mechanics must be consistent with Newton's equation within the domain where the latter is applicable, the Schrödinger equation was derived. This derivation constitutes the heart of the theoretical part, and allowed us to introduce Quantum Mechanics without having to refer to Analytical Mechanics. Thus the aim of making the theory accessible to students with the basic preparation normally provided in the first two years of Engineering was achieved. Moreover, this way of treating the theory allows us to see more clearly the basic concepts of Quantum Mechanics.

it: Qui si affronta lo studio della struttura atomica; i risultati dell'esperimento
en: Here the study of atomic structure is tackled; the results of the experiment provide essential and unimaginable information about how an atom is made. In the second part of the card the Schrödinger equation is applied to derive the Rutherford scattering formula; on the basis of this formula and of the measurements made, the atomic number of the gold atom is determined.

it: Sesta scheda, ulteriori sviluppi della teoria.
en: Sixth card, further developments of the theory.

it: Si generalizzano i principi fondamentali introdotti nella seconda scheda
en: The fundamental principles introduced in the second card are generalised and a series of consequences of these principles is introduced. In particular the quantities momentum, angular momentum and energy are considered; it is shown that with each of these quantities is associated a linear Hermitian operator that contains all the information relative to the quantity. On the basis of the fact that the definitions given in the scheme of Quantum Mechanics must, in the limit, be consistent with those given in the classical framework, the explicit formulation for the operators associated with momentum, angular momentum and energy is found; finally the quantisation of the various physical quantities is demonstrated, the feature that gives Quantum Mechanics its name. Moreover the energy levels of the hydrogen atom are determined.

it: Questo esperimento costituisce la più semplice e diretta prova sperimentale del fatto che l'energia interna di un atomo è quantizzata.
en: This experiment constitutes the simplest and most direct experimental proof of the fact that the internal energy of an atom is quantised.

it: In questo esperimento la luce si comporta in un modo che non è spiegabile
en: In this experiment light behaves in a way that cannot be explained within the framework of classical electromagnetic theory. The quantum nature of light is observed and Einstein's relation {0} is introduced. In the final part it is discussed that photons cannot be studied by means of the Schrödinger equation because it is not consistent with the Theory of Relativity, and the way towards Relativistic Quantum Mechanics is indicated.

it: Nona ed ultima scheda, spettri atomici di emissione.
en: Ninth and last card, atomic emission spectra.

it: Si misurano le frequenze delle radiazioni elettromagnetiche emesse dagli atomi quando vengono
en: The frequencies of the electromagnetic radiation emitted by atoms when they are “excited” are measured, and on the basis of Einstein's relation {0} the differences between the various energy levels of the atoms are obtained; finally these experimental results are compared with the theoretical results derived in the sixth card for the hydrogen atom, and a very close agreement is observed.

it: Il percorso che abbiamo scelto, in una materia vasta come la Meccanica Quantistica
en: The path we have chosen, in a subject as vast as Quantum Mechanics, turns out to be easy to follow and does not require excessive effort. The theoretical part is rigorous and complete, and does not leave the dissatisfaction that can arise from the impression of not having fully understood the basic concepts.

it: Il lavoro raggiunge il suo scopo didattico e, se opportunamente raffinato ed integrato
en: The work achieves its teaching aim and, if suitably refined and supplemented, can constitute the teaching material for an introductory course in Quantum Mechanics. Such a course, if activated, will be fully supported by the LAFIDIN teaching laboratory, where a good part of the laboratory experiences can be carried out.

it: Esperimento di Stern e Gerlach in cascata
Questa tesi vuole essere una breve introduzione alla Meccanica Quantistica.
en: This thesis is intended to be a brief introduction to Quantum Mechanics.

it: Il percorso che abbiamo scelto mi sembra abbastanza buono anche se deve essere molto migliorato
en: The path we have chosen seems to me fairly good, even though it must be greatly improved; the second card must be explained with greater clarity, and the sixth card must at least be reorganised; the Stern–Gerlach experiment and that of the atomic spectra could not be carried out due to delays in the shipment of the equipment, so when the experiments are ready the relevant cards will have to be rewritten.

it: Personalmente mi sono impegnato a sistemare il possibile anche dopo la Laurea
en: Personally, I have committed myself to fixing what is possible even after graduation, and I hope with all my heart that I have rendered a service that may in some way be useful to this beautiful University.

it: Tesi di Laurea in Ingegneria Elettrica
